status_legend.planned: Feature has been defined but not started.
status_legend.blocked: Feature is waiting on another feature or external dependency.
status_legend.done: Feature has passed its local acceptance checks.

milestones.name: 可对话
milestones.goal: 打通被动回复、工作区、最小日志闭环。

milestones.name: 可记忆
milestones.goal: 建立 markdown 和记忆召回基础设施。

milestones.name: 会主动
milestones.goal: 建立主动轮询、推送判断和节流。

milestones.name: 多渠道与调试闭环
milestones.goal: 打通双通道接入和本地 CLI 调试。

milestones.name: 会空闲自驱
milestones.goal: 建立 Drift 框架和预置任务。

features.title: 项目与工作区初始化底座
features.summary: 建立仓库骨架、CLI、配置文件、状态文件、默认工作区模板和基础验证命令。
acceptance: 仓库具备统一入口和默认目录约定。
工作区可重复初始化且不会覆盖已有关键文件。
状态文件可被后续 agent 读取并继续推进。

features.title: 被动回复主链路
features.summary: 定义 passive turn 输入输出、上下文注入、回复生成和 turn 落盘接口。
verification: uv run wusaki-agent passive-turn --channel cli --user demo --message '你好'
检查 turn 日志、上下文和回复输出
acceptance: 单轮消息可产出回复。
回复前能读取长期记忆和近期上下文。
回复后消息进入后处理链路。
progress_notes: Added `wusaki-agent passive-turn` CLI command for one-round passive execution.
Implemented deterministic passive response generation and turn log persistence under `.wusaki/state/`.
Added tests for passive turn runtime log outputs.
Passive turn now injects recent-context placeholder from `memory/RECENT_CONTEXT.md` and writes structured turn artifacts for downstream consolidation.
Passive turn now dispatches via channel adapters (`qq`/`telegram`) with deterministic CLI fallback.
Introduced normalized `PassiveTurnOutput` envelope model and unified passive-turn serialization around it.
Expanded passive artifact context into a `context_bundle` with recent context, memory placeholders, and recent turn hints.
Added `passive-turn --dry-run` path to validate passive pipeline output without writing state files.
Passive turn now reads both `MEMORY.md` and `RECENT_CONTEXT.md` before response and appends a postprocess queue entry after response.
Validated F002 acceptance flow by executing `passive-turn` and checking turn logs, context injection, artifact output, and postprocess queue linkage.

features.title: Markdown 记忆与 consolidation 基础设施
features.summary: 实现 MEMORY/SELF/HISTORY/RECENT_CONTEXT/PENDING 文件结构、幂等写入和最小 consolidation 流程。
verification: 针对记忆目录和文件结构运行单元测试
acceptance: 五个核心 markdown 文件结构清晰。
近期上下文和长期记忆边界明确。
同一批消息不会被重复写入。
progress_notes: Implemented `run_consolidation()` with idempotent turn processing based on `consolidation_index.json`.
Consolidation now writes `HISTORY.md`, `PENDING.md`, and updates `RECENT_CONTEXT.md`.
Added queue status transitions for `state/postprocess_queue.jsonl` and a `memory-consolidate` CLI command.
Added tests that validate markdown writes and idempotency for repeated consolidation runs.
Validated end-to-end F003 acceptance by running passive turn + memory consolidation and verifying markdown outputs, queue state, and idempotent re-run behavior.

features.title: 向量记忆兼容层
features.summary: 建立语义检索接口、向量存储占位实现和与 Akashic 路线兼容的抽象层。
verification: 对 retrieve/remember/forget 抽象运行契约测试
acceptance: 被动回复和主动推送可依赖统一记忆检索接口。
可替换为 Akashic 兼容实现而不改调用方。
progress_notes: Introduced shared vector memory contract (`retrieve/remember/forget`) via typed request/result models.
Implemented deterministic in-memory `StubVectorMemory` with replaceable `VectorMemory` protocol compatibility.
Added contract tests covering remember -> retrieve -> forget behavior and safe missing-id forget semantics.
Validated F004 acceptance flow by running explicit remember/retrieve/forget script and confirming contract behavior.

features.title: 主动推送与 MCP 来源抽象
features.summary: 定义 alert/content/context 三类来源、tick 状态、发送/跳过决策和节流接口。
verification: 检查决策日志中发送与跳过理由
acceptance: 系统能处理 alert/content/context 三类输入。
支持冷却时间和频率控制。
无内容时可切换到 Drift。

features.title: Drift 空闲任务框架
features.summary: 复用 SKILL.md 作为任务协议，支持任务发现、读取工作文件、静默结束和单次消息触达约束。
acceptance: 系统能扫描有效 skill。
一轮 Drift 必须显式结束并记录结果。
预置至少两个可运行的任务模板。

features.title: 统一配置、日志与调试 CLI
features.summary: 建立 Settings、路径约定、日志输出、状态查看和手动触发命令集合。
acceptance: 开发者可通过 CLI 完成初始化和基础排查。
关键目录和配置可直接查看。
后续主链路命令有明确挂载点。
progress_notes: Added relay-loop policy files and `wusaki-agent round-status` command.
CLI now exposes explicit round status from feature/progress/handoff state.
Added `wusaki-agent round-start` to activate exactly one in-progress relay round.
Added `wusaki-agent round-finish` to close active rounds with required verification evidence.
Added `wusaki-agent round-commit` to attach commit hashes to completed rounds.
Extended `wusaki-agent round-finish` to optionally attach commit hash in the same guarded operation.
Added CLI contract tests for round-start/round-finish/round-commit workflow constraints.
Validated F007 acceptance commands: `wusaki-agent --help`, `wusaki-agent status`, and `wusaki-agent show-features`.

features.title: QQ / Telegram 渠道抽象
features.summary: 定义统一 channel 协议、身份映射和消息收发占位实现，为 Feishu 预留扩展边界。
verification: CLI 模拟发送与接收流程
acceptance: 核心 Agent 能在不侵入业务逻辑的前提下挂接渠道适配器。
QQ 和 Telegram 可以复用同一套 turn 接口。
